notes: TechRxiv is IEEE's preprint server for engineering and technology research. IDs are numeric with optional version suffix.

match_nodes.description: TechRxiv preprint ID (numeric, optional .vN version suffix)

data.description: TechRxiv preprint identified by numeric ID with optional version suffix.
data.notes: TechRxiv is operated by IEEE. Preprints are assigned a numeric ID; subsequent versions append .v2, .v3, etc. The DOI uses the 10.36227/techrxiv prefix.
